main.name: Marchesa, Dealer of Death
main.oracle_text: Whenever you commit a crime, you may pay {1}. If you do, look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard. (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.)
main.flavor_text: "You should have folded when you had the chance."

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"Magic rings are, well, magical; and they are rare and curious."
—Gandalf

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"You are a time-space machine. You're a vehicle! I've never asked you to cheer me up with hologrammatic antlers!"
—The Twelfth Doctor

card.name: Animate Dead
card.oracle_text:
Enchant creature card in a graveyard
When this Aura enters, if it's on the battlefield, it loses "enchant creature card in a graveyard" and gains "enchant creature put onto the battlefield with this Aura." Return enchanted creature card to the battlefield under your control and attach this Aura to it. When this Aura leaves the battlefield, that creature's controller sacrifices it.
Enchanted creature gets -1/-0.

card.name: Blood Artist
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another creature dies, target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
card.flavor_text:
"Vanya Falkenrath's paintings are astonishing. How does she manage to achieve such rich crimson hues?"
—Stefan, art critic

card.name: Mind Stone
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.
card.flavor_text:
"Handles, I said, 'Put me on a ship.' I didn't say, 'Put me on a Dalek ship.'"
—The Eleventh Doctor

card.name: Dimir Signet
card.flavor_text: An emblem of a secret guild, the Dimir insignia is seen only by its own members—and the doomed.

card.name: Underground River
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {U} or {B}. This land deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text:
"But stream and pool is wet and cool: so nice for feet! We only wish to catch a fish, so juicy-sweet!"
—Gollum

card.name: Sunken Hollow
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.
card.flavor_text:
"So, we are fighting an unknown homicidal force that has taken the form of your commanding officer and a cowardly alien, underwater, in a nuclear reactor. Anything else I should know?"
—The Twelfth Doctor

card.name: Hammerheim
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {R}.
{T}: Target creature loses all landwalk abilities until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: "'Tis distance lends enchantment to the view,/ And robes the mountain in its azure hue." —Thomas Campbell, "Pleasures of Hope"

card.name: Tolaria
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {U}.
{T}: Target creature loses banding and all "bands with other" abilities until end of turn. Activate only during any upkeep step.
card.flavor_text: "Fairest Isle, all isles excelling,/ Seat of Pleasures, and of loves . . ." —John Dryden

card.name: Urborg
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {B}.
{T}: Target creature loses first strike or swampwalk until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: "Resignedly beneath the sky/The melancholy waters lie./So blend the turrets and shadows there/That all seem pendulous in air,/While from a proud tower in town/Death looks gigantically down." —Edgar Allan Poe, "The City in the Sea"

card.name: Sulfurous Springs
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}. This land deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text: A land defiled, diseased beyond all healing—unless the Great Sea should enter in and wash it with oblivion.

card.name: Reanimate
card.oracle_text: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.
card.flavor_text:
"You'd better be worth it."
—Liliana Vess

card.name: Opposition
card.oracle_text: Tap an untapped creature you control: Tap target artifact, creature, or land.
card.flavor_text: Exhausting a wizard can be exhausting work.

card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.

"Here did the Extinguisher steal the light from the world. Here will we sacrifice her to bring the Great Rekindling to our people."

card.name: Toxic Deluge

As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life.
All creatures get -X/-X until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: Even Sam's vision in the Mirror had not prepared him. The Old Grange on the west side had been knocked down, and its place taken by rows of tarred sheds. All the chestnuts were gone. The banks and hedgerows were broken.

card.name: Fellwar Stone
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text:

"Rats and jackals feast in his swath, but even they will not walk with him."
—Mangara

card.name: Starscream, Power Hungry // Starscream, Seeker Leader
card.type_line: Legendary Artifact Creature — Robot // Legendary Artifact — Vehicle

card_faces.name: Starscream, Power Hungry
card_faces.oracle_text:
More Than Meets the Eye {2}{B} (You may cast this card converted for {2}{B}.)
Flying
Whenever you draw a card, if you're the monarch, target opponent loses 2 life.
Whenever one or more creatures deal combat damage to you, convert Starscream.

card_faces.name: Starscream, Seeker Leader
card_faces.oracle_text:
Living metal (During your turn, this Vehicle is also a creature.)
Flying, menace, haste
Whenever Starscream deals combat damage to a player, if there is no monarch, that player becomes the monarch.
Whenever you become the monarch, convert Starscream.

card.name: Spatial Binding
card.oracle_text: Pay 1 life: Until your next upkeep, target permanent can't phase out.
card.flavor_text:
Time is the one shackle you can't break.
—Zhalfirin aphorism

card.name: Rewind
card.oracle_text: Counter target spell. Untap up to four lands.
card.flavor_text: "The best denials are simply that: a beginning and end unchanged, a dream with no memory."

card.name: Izzet Signet
card.flavor_text: The Izzet signet is redesigned often, each time becoming closer to a vanity portrait of Niv-Mizzet.

card.name: Spellskite
card.oracle_text: {U/P}: Change a target of target spell or ability to this creature. ({U/P} can be paid with either {U} or 2 life.)
card.flavor_text:
"Let's show Vorinclex that progress doesn't always need teeth or claws."
—Malcator, Executor of Synthesis

card.name: Hex Parasite
card.oracle_text: {X}{B/P}: Remove up to X counters from target permanent. For each counter removed this way, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. ({B/P} can be paid with either {B} or 2 life.)
card.flavor_text: Drawn by power, fueled by conquest.

card.name: Diplomatic Escort
card.oracle_text: {U}, {T}, Discard a card: Counter target spell or ability that targets a creature.

card.name: Pyrokinesis
card.oracle_text:
You may exile a red card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Pyrokinesis deals 4 damage divided as you choose among any number of target creatures.

card.name: Drakuseth, Maw of Flames
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever Drakuseth attacks, it deals 4 damage to any target and 3 damage to each of up to two other targets.
card.flavor_text:
"Spread out, you idiots! Spread out!"
—Marsden, party leader, last words

card.name: Misdirection
card.oracle_text:
You may exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Change the target of target spell with a single target.

card.name: Luxury Suite
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.
card.flavor_text: In opulent chambers behind closed doors, dynasties are made and broken with but a few murmured words.

card.name: Marchesa, Dealer of Death
card.oracle_text: Whenever you commit a crime, you may pay {1}. If you do, look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard. (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.)
card.flavor_text: "You should have folded when you had the chance."

tokens.name: A-Blood Artist
tokens.oracle_text: Whenever Blood Artist or another creature dies, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

tokens.name: Abyssal Harvester
tokens.oracle_text: {T}: Exile target creature card from a graveyard that was put there this turn. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a Nightmare in addition to its other types. Then exile all other Nightmare tokens you control.
tokens.flavor_text:
"Till the soil, spare no soul. / Neath the darkness, nightmares grow."
—Children's nursery rhyme

tokens.flavor_text: "I sincerely regret that your place of business burned itself down after you declined our protection."

tokens.flavor_text: "It's like the Doctor's," said Peri. "But infinitely superior, as I am to that galactic philanthropist," replied the Master.

Ward—{2}, Pay 2 life.

tokens.name: Magda, the Hoardmaster
tokens.oracle_text:
Whenever you commit a crime, create a tapped Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn. (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.)

card_faces.name: Sephiroth, Fabled SOLDIER
card_faces.oracle_text:
Whenever Sephiroth enters or attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, draw a card.
Whenever another creature dies, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. If this is the fourth time this ability has resolved this turn, transform Sephiroth.

card_faces.name: Sephiroth, One-Winged Angel
card_faces.oracle_text:
Flying
Super Nova — As this creature transforms into Sephiroth, One-Winged Angel, you get an emblem with "Whenever a creature dies, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life."
Whenever Sephiroth attacks, you may sacrifice any number of other creatures. If you do, draw that many cards.
